commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The hand of the LORD was upon me, and carried me out in the Spirit of the LORD, and set me down in the midst of the valley which was full of bones, Spirit, by a divine impulse. He was not really removed. (Menochius) (Calmet) Bones. "This passage is very famous. Jerome) It insinuates the liberation of the captives and of the Gentiles, as well as the mystery of the resurrection. (Worthington) If this were not to take place, it would not be adduced as a figure. (Tertullian) (St.
